entryRules: Enter only after a 1D candle closes above 624 with volume expansion returning above 10%.
Confirm RSI remains between 55 and 72 to avoid late overextension.
Require MACD to remain bullish or neutral-to-bullish on the confirmation candle.
exitRules: Take partial profit near 641 or when reward-to-risk reaches 1.8R.
Exit the remaining research position near 662 if momentum remains constructive.
Exit fully if price closes back below the active EMA trend filter.
riskRules: SignalPilot does not execute live trades; this is a research and backtesting specification only.
Risk no more than 1.6% of account equity on the idea.
Do not open new exposure during major event risk or if live CMC data falls back to stale snapshots.
positionSizing: Balanced risk: 1.6% maximum account risk per idea, capped at 8% notional exposure.
stopLoss: Initial stop below 588 support or 1.2 ATR from entry, whichever is tighter.
takeProfit: Primary target 641; secondary target 662 if volume and RSI confirmation remain intact.
invalidationConditions: RSI falls below 48 while MACD flips bearish.
Funding spikes aggressively positive while price fails to reclaim resistance, suggesting crowded positioning.
reasoning: BNB/USDT is classified as an expansion regime because price remains above the 20/50 EMA structure while RSI, MACD, sentiment, and narrative momentum are constructive. The negative 24h volume change reduces urgency, so the strategy waits for a confirmed close above resistance rather than assuming immediate continuation. Optional derivatives context supports cautious momentum because open interest is rising but funding is only mildly positive.
